scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && docker compose up -d && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n db,api,app -c cyan,green,yellow "docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml up -d" "cd backend && pnpm run dev" "pnpm run dev"
scripts.db:inspect: cd backend && docker exec -i backend-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d signal_poc -c "SELECT user_id, registration_id FROM prekey_bundle;" -c "SELECT user_id, count(*) AS opk_count FROM one_time_prekey GROUP BY user_id;"
scripts.db:verify: cd backend && docker exec -i backend-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d signal_poc -c "SELECT 'Prekey bundles:' AS info;" -c "SELECT user_id, registration_id FROM prekey_bundle;" -c "SELECT 'OPK pools:' AS info;" -c "SELECT user_id, count(*) AS remaining FROM one_time_prekey GROUP BY user_id;" -c "SELECT 'Messages are NOT stored (WS relay only).' AS note;"
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:clean: cd backend && docker exec -i backend-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d signal_poc -c "DELETE FROM one_time_prekey; DELETE FROM prekey_bundle;"
